title: Opening for Production Engineer at Su-Kam Power Systems

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Su-Kam Power Systems
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? Su-Kam Power Systems in Pune offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Su-Kam Power Systems:
Su-Kam Power Systems is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Su-Kam Power Systems!
